'''ngalate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:piedly|piedly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-l-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:piedly|piedly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ngalate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:ngalate|ngalate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngalatesher|ngalatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngalatesherĂ«m|ngalatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngalatero|ngalatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngalateshĂ«|ngalateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngalateshĂ«m|ngalateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingalatero|gokingalatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingalateshĂ«|gokingalateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingalateshĂ«m|gokingalateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongalankerom|gongalankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongalankeshĂ«|gongalankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongalankeshĂ«m|gongalankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongalankeya|gongalankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngalaterom|ngalaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngalatemu|ngalatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngalateya|ngalateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingalaterom|gokingalaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingalatemu|gokingalatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingalateya|gokingalateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngalalate|ngalalate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngalalatesher|ngalalatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngalalatesherĂ«m|ngalalatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngalalatero|ngalalatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngalalateshĂ«|ngalalateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngalalateshĂ«m|ngalalateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingalalatero|gokingalalatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingalalateshĂ«|gokingalalateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingalalateshĂ«m|gokingalalateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongalalankerom|gongalalankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongalalankeshĂ«|gongalalankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongalalankeshĂ«m|gongalalankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongalalankeya|gongalalankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngalalaterom|ngalalaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngalalatemu|ngalalatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngalalateya|ngalalateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingalalaterom|gokingalalaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingalalatemu|gokingalalatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingalalateya|gokingalalateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngĂŠlĂŠte|ngĂŠlĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngĂŠlĂŠtesher|ngĂŠlĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngĂŠlĂŠtesherĂ«m|ngĂŠlĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngĂŠlĂŠtero|ngĂŠlĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«|ngĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«m|ngĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingĂŠlĂŠtero|gokingĂŠlĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«|gokingĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«m|gokingĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongĂŠlĂŠnkerom|gongĂŠlĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongĂŠlĂŠnkeshĂ«|gongĂŠlĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongĂŠlĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gongĂŠlĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongĂŠlĂŠnkeya|gongĂŠlĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngĂŠlĂŠterom|ngĂŠlĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngĂŠlĂŠtemu|ngĂŠlĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngĂŠlĂŠteya|ngĂŠlĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingĂŠlĂŠterom|gokingĂŠlĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingĂŠlĂŠtemu|gokingĂŠlĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingĂŠlĂŠteya|gokingĂŠlĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngaflafte|ngaflafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngaflaftesher|ngaflaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngaflaftesherĂ«m|ngaflaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngaflaftero|ngaflaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngaflafteshĂ«|ngaflafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngaflafteshĂ«m|ngaflafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingaflaftero|gokingaflaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingaflafteshĂ«|gokingaflafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingaflafteshĂ«m|gokingaflafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongaflafnkerom|gongaflafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongaflafnkeshĂ«|gongaflafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongaflafnkeshĂ«m|gongaflafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongaflafnkeya|gongaflafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngaflafterom|ngaflafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngaflaftemu|ngaflaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngaflafteya|ngaflafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingaflafterom|gokingaflafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingaflaftemu|gokingaflaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingaflafteya|gokingaflafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
